data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_UncleHesTooPeppy: UNCLE: It's because of POKéMON that\nthis boy's got more pep, I suppose...\lBut he's become a bit too peppy...
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyWantToChallengeGy: WALLY: Aww, UNCLE, please?\pI want to challenge this GYM and see\nhow much better I've become.\pPlease? May I, please?
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_UncleYourePushingIt: UNCLE: Now hold on, WALLY.\pSince you started living with POKéMON,\nyou have grown quite a lot stronger.\pBut don't you think you're pushing it\nto suddenly challenge a GYM?
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyWeCanBeatAnyone: WALLY: I'm not pushing it.\pIf I combine forces with RALTS,\nwe can beat anyone!
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyWillYouBattleMe:
WALLY: Oh! Hi, {PLAYER}!\pI've gotten a lot stronger since we
met.\p{PLAYER}, I want you and my UNCLE to
understand that.\p{PLAYER}, please, will you have a
battle with me?
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyMyUncleWontKnowIm: WALLY: Oh... If you won't battle me,\n{PLAYER}, my UNCLE won't know that I've\lbecome really strong.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_UncleCanYouBattleWally: UNCLE: {PLAYER}{KUN}, was it?\nOn WALLY's behalf, can I ask you to\lbattle with him just this once?\pI don't think he's going to listen to\nany reason the way he is now.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyHereICome: WALLY: {PLAYER}, thank you.\pOkay... Here I come!
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyIllGoBackToVerdan: WALLY: UNCLE...\nI'll go back to VERDANTURF...
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_ThankYouNotEnoughToBat: {PLAYER}, thank you.\nBeing a TRAINER is tough, isn't it?\pIt's not enough just to have POKéMON\nand make them battle. That isn't what\lbeing a real TRAINER is about.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_UncleNoNeedToBeDown:
UNCLE: WALLY, there's no need to be so
down on yourself.\pWhy, what's keeping you from becoming
stronger and stronger?\pCome on, let's go home.
Everyone's waiting for you.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_UncleVisitUsSometime: UNCLE: {PLAYER}{KUN}, it just dawned on me\nthat you must be the TRAINER who kept\lan eye out for WALLY when he caught\lhis POKéMON.\pWhy don't you visit us in VERDANTURF\nsometime?\lI'm sure WALLY would enjoy it.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WattsonNeedFavorTakeKe:
WATTSON: Oh, {PLAYER}{KUN}!
You look like you have a lot of zip!\lThat's a good thing, wahahahaha!\pFine! I've decided!
I need a favor, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pMAUVILLE CITY has an underground
sector called NEW MAUVILLE.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, I'd like you to go there and
switch off the GENERATOR.\pThe GENERATOR has been running a bit
haywire. It's getting unsafe.\pHere, this is the KEY to get into NEW
MAUVILLE.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WattsonWontBeChallenge:
WATTSON: Don't you worry about it.
It won't be a challenge to you.\pThe entrance to NEW MAUVILLE is just
a short SURF away from ROUTE 110.\pThat's it, then, you have my trust!
Wahahahaha!
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WattsonThanksTakeTM: WATTSON: Wahahahaha!\pI knew it, {PLAYER}{KUN}! I knew I'd made\nthe right choice asking you!\pThis is my thanks - a TM containing\nTHUNDERBOLT!\pGo on, you've earned it!
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WattsonYoungTakeCharge: WATTSON: Wahahahaha!\pIt pleases me to no end to see the\nyoung step up and take charge!
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_NurseHurtMonBackToHeal: You know, it's cool to have POKéMON\nbattles and stuff...\pBut if your POKéMON gets hurt, you\nhave to nurse it back to health.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_AllSortsOfPeopleComeTh: The roads of this town stretch north\nand south, and east and west.\pBecause of that, we get all sorts of\npeople coming through.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_RydelVeryGenerous: Have you been to RYDEL'S CYCLES yet?\pRYDEL, the owner, is a very generous\nman.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_PokemonCanJumpYouOnBik: Even if you're riding a BIKE, wild\nPOKéMON could jump you.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_CitySign: MAUVILLE CITY\n“The bright and shiny city of fun!”
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_GymSign: MAUVILLE CITY POKéMON GYM\nLEADER: WATTSON\l“The cheerfully electrifying man!”
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_BikeShopSign: “Ride in gravel and shake up your\nsoul!”\lRYDEL'S CYCLES
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_GameCornerSign: “The play spot for all!”\nMAUVILLE GAME CORNER
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_ExplainTV:
Hi, do you check out TV at all?\pThey've added a bunch of cool new
shows recently.\pTV is so cool. I've seen my friends on
TV just out of the blue.\pAnd, sometimes, they even put you on TV
without telling you.\pI wish I would be on TV sometime.\pThat's why I think you should check
out TVs whenever you can.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_BeenCheckingOutTV: Hi, have you been checking out TVs?
